title: Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Tallisibeth_Enwandung-Esterhazy.jpg]] |name=Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy
"Scout" |homeworld=[[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]]''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' |birth=[[34 BBY/Legends|34 BBY]], Vorzyd V |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |feathers= |eyes=Green |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters=*[[Chankar Kim]] *[[Jai Maruk]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Too few Jedi have I already. But even had I a crop of thousands, small one, I would not let you go without a fight. Spirit and determination you have. Between the stars, so much darkness there is. Why would I throw away one who burns so bright?|[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]|}} '''Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy''', better known by her nickname '''Scout''', was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Biography== ===Early life and Jedi training=== {{Quote|Tallisibeth, being a Jedi is about being resourceful, keeping your eyes open, and never, ever giving up. You taught me a lot about being a Jedi today.|[[Pax Chizzik]]|}} A native of [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]], the young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy was born to poor parents in the slums of their world. When a [[Jedi recruiter|recruiter]] for the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] passed through the planet's ports, the family begged the Jedi to take their child offworld and train her in the Order. Turning the [[Gender/Legends|girl]] over to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], Enwandung-Esterhazy entered into the [[Jedi academy|Temple's academy]] and began [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Despite her tenacity and will to succeed, Enwandung-Esterhazy had a relatively weak connection to the Force; many of her [[Jedi instructor|instructors]] doubted that she would pass the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and presumed that she was destined for the [[Jedi Service Corps/Legends|Jedi Service Corps]]. Earning the nickname "Scout" due to [[Precognition#Battle Precognition|her ability]] to quickly analyze a situation using the Force, Enwandung-Esterhazy focused on honing her physical abilities in order to compensate for her poor performance in Force-related exercises. During the later stages of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Enwandung-Esterhazy was selected by Master [[Chankar Kim]] to be her apprentice, much to the surprise of many of the academy's instructors and students. Under Master Kim's tutelage, Enwandung-Esterhazy constructed a [[Color/Legends|sky-blue]]-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and honed her abilities in many unorthodox maneuvers. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Kim dutifully accompanied Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] on a major rescue mission and laid down her life during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|ensuing battle]]. Devastated when news of her master's untimely death reached the Temple, Enwandung-Esterhazy felt certain that the [[Council of Reassignment/Legends|Council of Reassignment]] would place her in the [[Agricultural Corps/Legends|Agricultural Corps]], a move that was championed by Master [[Jai Maruk]], who expressed his opinion to [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] after the girl had remained at the Temple for two years awaiting reassignment. Master Yoda did not agree with Maruk's assessment, and bet Maruk that Enwandung-Esterhazy would win the annual [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]], with the wager being that Maruk would choose her as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] should she win. Maruk agreed, and was shocked after Enwandung-Esterhazy survived all eight rounds and won the tournament through creative, non-Force methods. Maruk hesitantly took her as his Padawan, and she ascended to the rank of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. ===Mission to Vjun=== [[File:Dark_Rendezvous.jpg|thumb|left|280px|Asajj Ventress holds Scout in a Force grip on Vjun.]] A few months into the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Jedi learned that Count Dooku, leader of the Confederacy, had taken over [[Château Malreaux]] on [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]. Dooku made a plea to Master Yoda, claiming that the war had gotten out of hand and that he was willing to negotiate a truce. Master Yoda selected a small group of Jedi to accompany him to Vjun, bringing Masters Maruk and [[Maks Leem]], as well as their respective Padawans, Enwandung-Esterhazy and Vjun native [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]]. On the way to Vjun, the Jedi stopped at [[Phindar Station]], and were ambushed by [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassin]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] and a group of [[A-series assassin droid|assassin droids]]. During the battle, Masters Maruk and Leem engaged Ventress in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]], but she proved the better duelist. Maruk nearly gave in to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], but was calmed by Leem; despite this, Maruk was slashed across the stomach, mortally wounding him, and Leem was stabbed in the back, killing her. As Maruk lay dying, Enwandung-Esterhazy clambered to his side and begged him not to leave her; Maruk promised her that he never would. Enwandung-Esterhazy had lost her second Master to the Clone Wars, but the Jedi pressed on from the station to Vjun. After landing planetside, Master Yoda left the Padawans and began negotiations with Count Dooku. In the meantime, the two investigated tremors in the Force that Malreaux had felt, and ended up running into Ventress once more. Both Padawans were quickly captured, and Enwandung-Esterhazy was held by Ventress in a [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force-grip]]. Ventress, sensing Malreaux's feelings for Enwandung-Esterhazy, tried to tempt the boy to the dark side by telling him to kiss his vulnerable companion. Holding the life of Enwandung-Esterhazy in her hand, she forced him to choose. Malreaux struggled with the decision, but Enwandung-Esterhazy managed to speak through Ventress' grip, telling Malreaux that she knew he would make the right decision. Malreaux resisted Ventress' temptations, much to her chagrin and, as Ventress prepared to order a cadre of assassin droids to kill the Padawans, [[Solis]] arrived and attacked Dooku's acolyte, giving the two adolescents time to escape. Soon, Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] arrived to rescue Yoda and the Padawans, and Enwandung-Esterhazy returned with them to Coruscant afterward. ===The Dark Times=== Remaining at the Jedi Temple for the rest of the war, Enwandung-Esterhazy was present when [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] betrayed the Order and issued [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the Grand Army, commanding them to turn their blasters on the Jedi and execute them. Escaping the Temple as Darth Vader invaded with the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]], Enwandung-Esterhazy was later found by [[Nyreen Vollen]], who brought her to [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] in the company of fellow Jedi [[Kina Ha]]. When Enwandung-Esterhazy first arrived on Mandalore, her new guardian [[Kal Skirata]] was initially shocked by the girl's resemblance to another Jedi, recently deceased [[Etain Tur-Mukan]]; the similarities almost brought him to tears and made him struggle to keep his composure. The [[strill]] [[Lord Mirdalan]] even thought she was Tur-Mukan and got excited upon first seeing her. Enwandung-Esterhazy lived in [[Kyrimorut/Legends|Kyrimorut]] and bonded with [[Mij Gilamar]], who agreed to give her some first aid training, and [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Ovolot Qail Uthan]] who made Enwandung-Esterhazy her assistant. When Skirata made a deal with fugitive Jedi Master [[Djinn Altis/Legends|Djinn Altis]] to take in the Jedi who were staying in Kyrimorut, Enwandung-Esterhazy decided that she wanted to stay on Mandalore with Gilamar and Uthan, but was unwilling to give up being a Jedi.''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|She has lived with her temptations for years—to cheat, to peek at other kids' tests, to conspire against quicker students to make herself look better. She may not play by the 'regular' rules, but she has committed her whole soul to living with honor, despite her limitations. She will be fine, as long as she remains in the Order. If she were to be cast out, perhaps bitterness might drive her to the dark side. If she felt we betrayed her.|Jai Maruk to Whie Malreaux|}} A Human female, Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy was red-haired and had an athletic body; she was considered pretty by fellow Padawan Whie Malreaux, who became infatuated with her. Resembling fellow Jedi Etain Tur-Mukan both physically and personality-wise, Enwandung-Esterhazy was constantly doubting herself, but was very kind and strong regardless, and believed in hard work to overcome obstacles. She was quick to form friendships with people, such as Padawan [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]], with whom she was close friends and received letters from Tano about her experience during the war.''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' She also became close to [[Cuy'val Dar]] [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] Mij Gilamar and [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] Ovolot Qail Uthan after the disbanding of the Order, almost starting to become like an adopted daughter to the already close pair. However, despite her fugitive status and the dissolution of the Order, she was not yet ready to become [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] by adoption like former Jedi [[Bardan Jusik]], proud of her Jedi heritage and her accomplishments. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|She helps grow things, and says they thought she was a useless Jedi, more mundane talent than Force skills.|[[Nyreen Vollen]]|''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''}} While Enwandung-Esterhazy was somewhat weak in the Force, she compensated by wearing armor and becoming adept in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] and [[Broken Gate|unarmed combat]]—not to mention displaying a willingness to ignore proper rules of conduct. This latter trait was not always expedient, as it could include practices impossible outside training sessions, such as grabbing a training lightsaber blade. She was said to be the favorite student of Master [[Ilena Xan]] and possessed natural precognitive abilities which manifested themselves in her habit of scoping out a situation and reading it a little faster than everyone else—a skill which earned her the nickname "Scout." ==Behind the scenes== Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy was created for the [[2004]] novel ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', written by [[Sean Stewart]]. She was first pictured in the [[2012]] reference book ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'', which includes one artwork of her with blond hair, despite the text describing her hair as red. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Battle for the Republic]]'' {{1stp}} *''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|soundcat=Audio files of Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |cs=Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy |de=Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy |es=Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy |pl=Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Enwandung-Esterhazy, Tallisibeth}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Commanders]] [[Category:Jedi Purge survivors]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi]]
